text:
The user wants me to:
1. Create a zip file of the project
2. Remove device management and theme changes from yesterday
3. Just keep a light and dark theme toggle button
4. Make sure NOT to remove from the main code
5. Make a copy, remove from the copy, and zip the edited copy

First, I need to understand the current state of the project. Let me explore the directory structure to see what we're working with.
